user_request: 别老汇报，直接推进。除非付款和法律文件，不要来问我。
english_translation: Stop reporting constantly, just push forward. Don't ask me about anything except payment and legal documents.
characteristics: Contains operational directives (stop X, do Y)
Implies hidden priority: maximize autonomous execution
Frustrated tone signals strong preference for independence

parsed_intent.intent_summary: User wants autonomous execution with minimal communication overhead
parsed_intent.real_goal: Maximize independent agent work and minimize interruptions
parsed_intent.deliverable: Clear operating parameters for autonomous execution
hard_constraints: Minimize clarification questions and status reports
Gate only on payment and legal matters
